summary: The diff implements REQ-12 (green and saffron palette retheme) thoroughly across CSS, Tailwind config, and all major pages/components. REQ-11 is partially implemented: the hero background image is wired up in LandingPage.tsx with an overlay and preserved content, but the image is served from /assets/unnamed.jpg rather than the required path /assets/generated/hero-bg.jpg, and there is no evidence that the file was saved/copied to frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.jpg.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded tribal film camera artwork as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.jpg and serve it from that path.
missing_requirements.reason: LandingPage.tsx references src='/assets/unnamed.jpg' instead of '/assets/generated/hero-bg.jpg'. There is no evidence in the diff of the file being added or copied to frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.jpg.

hallucinated_features.description: A backward-compatibility 'amber' box-shadow alias was added in tailwind.config.js to preserve existing shadow-amber classes.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not ask for backward compatibility aliases; it asked for the old amber/charcoal tokens to be replaced, not aliased.
